cum_cases_measles_age.short_name: Cumulative measles cases by age group
cum_cases_measles_age.long_name: Cumulative measles cases in the United States by age group
cum_cases_measles_age.short_description: Cumulative count of confirmed measles cases in the United States since the start ofthe calendar year, stratified by age group.
cum_cases_measles_age.long_description: This dataset contains cumulative counts of confirmed measles cases in the United States, reported by the CDC. Data is stratified by age group (0-4 years, 5-19 years, 20+ years, and Unknown age). Values represent cumulative cases from the start of each calendar year. For 2025, the first data was available from Feb 7, 2025. Data is manually recorded from the CDC measles surveillance page.
cum_cases_measles_age.statement: As of {time}, there have been {value} cumulative measles cases in the {age} age group in the United States.
